mnemonics.title: GRU vs LSTM
mnemonics.content: GRU: 2 gates (Update/Reset), LSTM: 3 gates + cell state

acronyms.usage: Simplified LSTM variant with fewer parameters

visualTips.visualization: Imagine conveyor belt carrying long-term memory through time steps

analogies.analogy: Like a team: Forget gate=janitor, Input gate=receptionist, Output gate=spokesperson
